MCP spec-reader v0.4.1: server [SUFFICIENT] signal (rule-of-thirds — when >33% of content filtered/trimmed, emits hint to stop follow-up calls). Prompt: bsyn gate fix (exclude block_syntax index for mechanism/pipeline/architecture HOW-queries), accumulation strategy with gated keyword pivot (requires ≥3 calls + no [SUFFICIENT] + named missing dimension), reasoning leak prohibition.

MCP spec-reader v0.4.0: 3 new aspect indices (bsyn, onma, grix — 14 total), QA mode (MiniLM embedding), NDP (normative constraint extraction), SPO answerability, content narrowing (60-80% token reduction), onto:WHERE, 8 new search_spec params.

MCP spec-reader v0.3.0: concept-anchor mechanism (CONSTRUCT_ANCHOR for 10 construct types), autoExpand budget expansion, tier:adaptive, relevance gate, verbose:none. Benchmark protocol v0.4 with 4-artifact format and token metrics.
Scoring model v2.1: onto-affinity auto-ranking (INDEX_ONTO_AFFINITY). Q7 surrogate T1 fix. 238 tests.
Scoring model v2: enriched cap (CAP_MULT=2), NDP onto-aware sort (ws→onto→penalty), domainsAsAuthorities onto:HOW tag. 238 tests.
update documentation and examples for clarity, syntax, and consistency across multiple sections
Initial public release of E.L.I.A. language specification v1.0
Added MCP spec-reader server with 5 tools: search_spec, read_chain, list_units, fulltext_search, lookup_xref
